records.question: Which clubs have a coach named Joe Fabbri with rank at most 2 and match results showing exactly 20 gold, 8 bronze, and 9 small silver medals?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT club.club_id FROM club
JOIN coach ON club.club_id = coach.club_id
JOIN match_result ON club.club_id = match_result.club_id
WHERE coach.rank <= 2 AND match_result.gold = 20 AND coach.coach_name = 'Joe Fabbri' AND match_result.bronze = 8 AND match_result.small_silver = 9
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.Club_ID
FROM club c
JOIN coach co ON c.Club_ID = co.Club_ID
JOIN match_result mr ON c.Club_ID = mr.Club_ID
WHERE co.Coach_name = 'Joe Fabbri'
AND co.Rank <= 2
AND mr.Gold = 20
AND mr.Bronze = 8
AND mr.Small_Silver = 9

records.question: Which clubs have match results with at least 6 gold?
records.gold_sql:

WHERE match_result.gold >= 6
records.pred_sql:
SELECT club.Club_ID
FROM club
JOIN match_result ON club.Club_ID = match_result.Club_ID

records.question: Which clubs named 'AIK' have at least one coach and have at least one match result with gold exactly 20?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT club.club_id FROM club
JOIN coach ON club.club_id = coach.club_id
JOIN match_result ON club.club_id = match_result.club_id
WHERE club.club_name = 'AIK' AND match_result.gold = 20
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.Club_ID
FROM club c
WHERE c.Club_name = 'AIK'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM coach co 
    WHERE co.Club_ID = c.Club_ID
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM match_result mr 
    WHERE mr.Club_ID = c.Club_ID 
    AND mr.Gold = 20
)

JOIN coach ON club.club_id = coach.club_id
JOIN match_result ON club.club_id = match_result.club_id
WHERE match_result.bronze <= 7 AND match_result.rank <= 3
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.Club_ID
FROM club c
JOIN coach co ON c.Club_ID = co.Club_ID
JOIN match_result mr ON c.Club_ID = mr.Club_ID
WHERE mr.Bronze <= 7 AND mr.Rank <= 3

records.question: What clubs coached by James Wong have earned at least 4 small silver medals and no more than 7 bronze medals?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT club.club_id FROM club
JOIN coach ON club.club_id = coach.club_id
JOIN match_result ON club.club_id = match_result.club_id
WHERE match_result.small_silver >= 4 AND match_result.bronze <= 7 AND coach.coach_name = 'James Wong'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.Club_ID
FROM club c
JOIN coach co ON c.Club_ID = co.Club_ID
JOIN match_result mr ON c.Club_ID = mr.Club_ID
WHERE co.Coach_name = 'James Wong'
AND mr.Small_Silver >= 4
AND mr.Bronze <= 7

records.question: Which clubs in the USA that have at least one coach and at least one match result with small_silver at most 9 are being referred to?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT club.club_id FROM club
JOIN coach ON club.club_id = coach.club_id
JOIN match_result ON club.club_id = match_result.club_id
WHERE match_result.small_silver <= 9 AND club.region = 'USA'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.Club_ID
FROM club c
JOIN coach co ON c.Club_ID = co.Club_ID
JOIN match_result mr ON c.Club_ID = mr.Club_ID
WHERE c.Region = 'USA' AND mr.Small_Silver <= 9

records.question: What clubs have no more than 89 points, at least 10 small silver, and exactly 8 bronze?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT club.club_id FROM club
JOIN match_result ON club.club_id = match_result.club_id
WHERE match_result.points <= 89 AND match_result.small_silver >= 10 AND match_result.bronze = 8
records.pred_sql:
SELECT club.Club_ID
FROM club
JOIN match_result ON club.Club_ID = match_result.Club_ID
WHERE match_result.Points <= 89 
  AND match_result.Small_Silver >= 10 
  AND match_result.Bronze = 8

records.question: Which clubs named AIK in the USA started in 2009, have Joe Fabbri as coach, earned at least 168 points and 9 or more small silver medals, but at most 8 bronze medals?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT club.club_id FROM club
JOIN coach ON club.club_id = coach.club_id
JOIN match_result ON club.club_id = match_result.club_id
WHERE match_result.points >= 168 AND match_result.small_silver >= 9 AND club.start_year = 2009 AND coach.coach_name = 'Joe Fabbri' AND club.region = 'USA' AND match_result.bronze <= 8 AND club.club_name = 'AIK'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.Club_ID
FROM club c
JOIN coach co ON c.Club_ID = co.Club_ID
JOIN match_result mr ON c.Club_ID = mr.Club_ID
WHERE c.Club_name = 'AIK'
AND c.Region = 'USA'
AND c.Start_year = 2009
AND co.Coach_name = 'Joe Fabbri'
AND mr.Points >= 168
AND mr.Small_Silver >= 9
AND mr.Bronze <= 8

records.question: Which clubs have a coach named Joe Fabbri who is female and has a rank of at most 2?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT club.club_id FROM club
JOIN coach ON club.club_id = coach.club_id
WHERE coach.coach_name = 'Joe Fabbri' AND coach.gender = 'F' AND coach.rank <= 2
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.Club_ID
FROM club c
JOIN coach co ON c.Club_ID = co.Club_ID
WHERE co.Coach_name = 'Joe Fabbri' AND co.Gender = 'F' AND co.Rank <= 2
